highlight: Dog lover | Passionate about technology, music, and art
intro: My journey into software development began even before university, fueled by curiosity through online courses and the energy of tech communities. Today, I am a Software Engineer with 5 years of experience, versatile and quick to adapt to new technologies, having worked with React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Django, Vue.js, and AWS depending on what each project needed.
denouement: Throughout my career, I have evolved from building scalable web applications to creating AI-powered products, including conversational onboarding flows, in-app copilots, and custom Claude AI skills and agents. I am passionate about solving complex problems, learning new technologies, and sharing knowledge with the community.
hobbies: When I'm not coding, you'll find me out for a walk with my dog <anchorEmma>Emma</anchorEmma>, exploring local fairs, or recharging with great music and film.
